title: To Wipe or Not to Wipe: Masah Over Socks?
stanceSummary: In this answer, Yasir Qadhi addresses "To Wipe or Not to Wipe: Masah Over Socks" and outlines the ruling with its main conditions and limits. He emphasizes following foundational Quranic and Sunnah principles while accounting for context, scholarly nuance, and practical realities for Muslims today.
